channel.title: Blog on Remko's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on Remko's Blog

item.title: New Categories
item.description:
I added some new Categories to the Blog, something I should have done a long time ago.

I also tried to add missing Categories to existing posts but I didn’t check all posts ever written so feel free to add a comment to this post if you miss a category or that a certain post is properly categorized.

item.title: Rating and contact options
item.description:
I have installed a new rating plugin that gives you, my readers, a convenient and fast method to give feedback. So please do so, let me know what posts you find interesting!

I have also added a Contact form in case you have any questions, article suggestions or maybe even consultation requests. The contact page is an attempt to streamline the e-mails I get from this blog so I hope this will work :-)
